chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-504 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2324/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on CMA No.2325/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 22-04-2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent Application is granted. 2 to 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
